mapper.sql: c.COMMUNITY_ID, c.TENANT_ID, c.COMMUNITY_NM, c.COMMUNITY_DESC, c.COMMUNITY_TYPE_CD, c.VISIBILITY_CD, c.JOIN_POLICY_CD, c.DEPT_ID, d.DEPT_NM, c.INTRO_TEXT, c.ICON_FILE_ID, c.COVER_FILE_ID, c.POST_TEMPLATE_HTML, c.CLOSED_YN, c.CLOSED_DT, c.OWNER_USER_ID, owner.USER_NM AS OWNER_USER_NM, c.DEL_YN, c.CRT_DT, c.LAST_CHG_DT, COALESCE(pref.FAVORITE_YN, 'N') AS FAVORITE_YN, pref.SORT_ORDR, me.ROLE_CD AS MEMBER_ROLE_CD, me.STATUS_CD AS MEMBER_STATUS_CD, CASE WHEN me.STATUS_CD = 'active' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS JOINED_YN, CASE WHEN me.STATUS_CD = 'active' THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS JOINED, CASE WHEN #{admin} = TRUE THEN TRUE WHEN me.STATUS_CD = 'active' AND me.ROLE_CD IN ('owner', 'operator') THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS MANAGEABLE, CASE WHEN COALESCE(c.CLOSED_YN, 'N') = 'Y' OR COALESCE(c.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'Y' THEN FALSE WHEN c.COMMUNITY_TYPE_CD = 'org' THEN FALSE WHEN me.STATUS_CD = 'active' THEN FALSE WHEN c.VISIBILITY_CD = 'private' THEN FALSE WHEN c.JOIN_POLICY_CD = 'invite_only' THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END AS JOINABLE, CASE WHEN c.COMMUNITY_TYPE_CD = 'org' THEN FALSE WHEN me.STATUS_CD = 'active' AND COALESCE(me.ROLE_CD, 'member') <> 'owner' THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS LEAVABLE, CASE WHEN #{admin} = TRUE THEN TRUE WHEN me.STATUS_CD = 'active' AND me.ROLE_CD = 'owner' AND c.COMMUNITY_TYPE_CD <> 'org' THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS CLOSABLE, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMUNITY_MEMBER cm2 WHERE cm2.COMMUNITY_ID = c.COMMUNITY_ID AND cm2.STATUS_CD = 'active' ) AS MEMBER_COUNT, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMUNITY_MEMBER cm2 WHERE cm2.COMMUNITY_ID = c.COMMUNITY_ID AND cm2.STATUS_CD = 'active' AND cm2.ROLE_CD = 'operator' ) AS OPERATOR_COUNT, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMUNITY_MEMBER cm2 WHERE cm2.COMMUNITY_ID = c.COMMUNITY_ID AND cm2.STATUS_CD = 'pending' ) AS PENDING_COUNT, icon_fd.FILE_PATH AS ICON_FILE_PATH, cover_fd.FILE_PATH AS COVER_FILE_PATH
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM COMMUNITY c LEFT JOIN COMMUNITY_MEMBER me ON me.COMMUNITY_ID = c.COMMUNITY_ID AND me.USER_ID = #{userId} LEFT JOIN COMMUNITY_USER_PREF pref ON pref.COMMUNITY_ID = c.COMMUNITY_ID AND pref.USER_ID = #{userId} LEFT JOIN USERS owner ON owner.USER_ID = c.OWNER_USER_ID LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON d.DEPT_ID = c.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN FILE_DETAIL icon_fd ON icon_fd.FILE_ID = c.ICON_FILE_ID AND COALESCE(icon_fd.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' LEFT JOIN FILE_DETAIL cover_fd ON cover_fd.FILE_ID = c.COVER_FILE_ID AND COALESCE(cover_fd.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' WHERE c.TENANT_ID = #{tenantId} AND COALESCE(c.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND COALESCE(c.CLOSED_YN, 'N') = 'N'
AND c.COMMUNITY_TYPE_CD <> 'org' AND c.VISIBILITY_CD = 'public' AND COALESCE(me.STATUS_CD, '') NOT IN ('active', 'pending')
AND me.STATUS_CD = 'active' AND COALESCE(pref.FAVORITE_YN, 'N') = 'Y'
AND me.STATUS_CD = 'active'
AND ( #{admin} = TRUE OR (me.STATUS_CD = 'active' AND me.ROLE_CD IN ('owner', 'operator')) )
AND ( c.COMMUNITY_NM ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(c.INTRO_TEXT, c.COMMUNITY_DESC, '') ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(c.COMMUNITY_DESC, '') ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY CASE WHEN c.COMMUNITY_TYPE_CD = 'org' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, CASE WHEN COALESCE(pref.FAVORITE_YN, 'N') = 'Y' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, CASE WHEN c.COMMUNITY_TYPE_CD = 'org' THEN COALESCE(d.SORT_NUM, 9999) ELSE COALESCE(pref.SORT_ORDR, 9999) END, c.COMMUNITY_NM, c.COMMUNITY_ID

SELECT
FROM COMMUNITY c LEFT JOIN COMMUNITY_MEMBER me ON me.COMMUNITY_ID = c.COMMUNITY_ID AND me.USER_ID = #{userId} LEFT JOIN COMMUNITY_USER_PREF pref ON pref.COMMUNITY_ID = c.COMMUNITY_ID AND pref.USER_ID = #{userId} LEFT JOIN USERS owner ON owner.USER_ID = c.OWNER_USER_ID LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON d.DEPT_ID = c.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN FILE_DETAIL icon_fd ON icon_fd.FILE_ID = c.ICON_FILE_ID AND COALESCE(icon_fd.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' LEFT JOIN FILE_DETAIL cover_fd ON cover_fd.FILE_ID = c.COVER_FILE_ID AND COALESCE(cover_fd.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' WHERE c.TENANT_ID = #{tenantId} AND c.COMMUNITY_ID = #{communityId} AND COALESCE(c.DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND COALESCE(c.CLOSED_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND ( #{admin} = TRUE OR me.STATUS_CD = 'active' OR (c.COMMUNITY_TYPE_CD <> 'org' AND c.VISIBILITY_CD = 'public') )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMMUNITY ( TENANT_ID, COMMUNITY_NM, COMMUNITY_DESC, COMMUNITY_TYPE_CD, OWNER_USER_ID, DEL_YN, CRT_DT, LAST_CHG_DT, VISIBILITY_CD, JOIN_POLICY_CD, DEPT_ID, INTRO_TEXT, ICON_FILE_ID, COVER_FILE_ID, POST_TEMPLATE_HTML, CLOSED_YN, CLOSED_DT ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{communityNm}, #{communityDesc}, COALESCE(#{communityTypeCd}, 'general'), #{ownerUserId}, 'N', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, COALESCE(#{visibilityCd}, 'private'), COALESCE(#{joinPolicyCd}, 'invite_only'), #{deptId}, COALESCE(#{introText}, #{communityDesc}), #{iconFileId}, #{coverFileId}, #{postTemplateHtml}, COALESCE(#{closedYn}, 'N'), #{closedDt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE COMMUNITY SET COMMUNITY_NM = COALESCE(#{communityNm}, COMMUNITY_NM), COMMUNITY_DESC = #{communityDesc}, COMMUNITY_TYPE_CD = COALESCE(#{communityTypeCd}, COMMUNITY_TYPE_CD), OWNER_USER_ID = #{ownerUserId}, VISIBILITY_CD = COALESCE(#{visibilityCd}, VISIBILITY_CD), JOIN_POLICY_CD = COALESCE(#{joinPolicyCd}, JOIN_POLICY_CD), DEPT_ID = #{deptId}, INTRO_TEXT = COALESCE(#{introText}, #{communityDesc}), ICON_FILE_ID = COALESCE(#{iconFileId}, ICON_FILE_ID), COVER_FILE_ID = COALESCE(#{coverFileId}, COVER_FILE_ID), POST_TEMPLATE_HTML = #{postTemplateHtml}, CLOSED_YN = COALESCE(#{closedYn}, CLOSED_YN), CLOSED_DT = #{closedDt}, LAST_CHG_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE COMMUNITY_ID = #{communityId} AND COALESCE(DEL_YN, 'N') = 'N'
UPDATE COMMUNITY SET DEL_YN = 'Y', CLOSED_YN = 'Y', CLOSED_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, LAST_CHG_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE COMMUNITY_ID = #{communityId} AND OWNER_USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMMUNITY_MEMBER ( COMMUNITY_ID, USER_ID, ROLE_CD, STATUS_CD, CRT_DT, LAST_CHG_DT ) VALUES ( #{communityId}, #{userId}, COALESCE(#{roleCd}, 'member'), COALESCE(#{statusCd}, 'active'), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON CONFLICT (COMMUNITY_ID, USER_ID) DO UPDATE SET ROLE_CD = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.ROLE_CD, COMMUNITY_MEMBER.ROLE_CD), STATUS_CD = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.STATUS_CD, COMMUNITY_MEMBER.STATUS_CD), LAST_CHG_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
